title: 2026-02-27 TACO Pressure Index Update: Low at 8.92
description: Today’s retreat-pressure snapshot for 2026-02-27: the TACO Pressure Index closed at 8.92/100, signaling a low pressure regime as volatility and equity stress shaped the daily read. Includes charts, a component breakdown, and a narrative summary.
hero_summary: The index is designed to approximate how market stress can build pressure for a softer policy posture. On 2026-02-27, the score printed 8.92/100 in the low regime, with volatility and equity stress doing most of the work.
